leadText: Flower Trick (Japanese: トリックフラワー Trick Flower) is a damage-dealing Grass-type move introduced in Generation IX. It is the signature move of Meowscarada.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Flower Trick inflicts damage and bypasses accuracy checks to always hit, unless the target is in the semi-invulnerable turn of a move such as Dig or Fly . It will always result in a critical hit unless the target has Battle Armor or Shell Armor .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V The user throws a rigged bouquet of flowers at the target. This attack never misses and always lands a critical hit.
